event: established renal failure secondary to adult polycystic kidney disease (APKD)
ultrasound scan did not demonstrate any focus of infection
transferred to the critical care unit
CT scan demonstrated gas within both renal parenchyma
CT: gas outlining cyst in upper pole of right kidney
similar changes in left kidney on CT
percutaneous drainage of right kidney collection
E. coli cultured from pus aspirate
repeat CT scan: infection improved bilaterally
received 4 units of fresh frozen plasma
histological examination: inflammatory changes consistent with infection
